calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition Of Ana Cristina Calvillo To Perpetuate Testimony Of Louis Ronald Calvillo By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar Feb-16-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES Via CourtCall:
Jason M. Rose of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for petitioner Ana Cristina Calvillo.
Ian P. Dillon of WFBM, LLP (714-634-2522), appearing for defendant NV Heathorn Inc.
Laila Rahimi-Keshari of FOLEY & MANSFIELD (510-590-9500), appearing for Respondent Columbia Mechanical.

RULING:
Not contested and tentative ruling adopted: The Petition of Ana Cristina Calvillo to Perpetuate Testimony of Louis Ronald Calvillo by Videotaped Deposition is GRANTED under C.C.P. section 2035.010. Adverse parties were provided notice. The Court did not consider Respondent San Francisco Mechanical's opposition for untimely filing. (See C.C.P. section 1005(b).) The videotaped deposition of Louis Ronald Calvillo will occur by Zoom or remote technology within thirty days. All parties are to file a Special Notice of Appearance within two Court days. Order signed in open court. Judge: Samuel K. Feng, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/SKF)
